subject: [PATCH v2 07/14] mm: handle VM_UFFD_RWP in khugepaged, rmap, and GUP

2026-05-14.patch_summary: This patch series extends three mm paths to handle VM_UFFD_RWP (User Faultfd Read-Write Protected) consistently, ensuring that per-PTE RWP state is not silently destroyed or bypassed. The changes affect khugepaged, rmap, and GUP, broadening the VMA predicate in khugepaged and capping batching at 1 for VM_UFFD_RWP in rmap.

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch series extends three mm paths to handle VM_UFFD_RWP (User Faultfd Read-Write Protected) consistently, ensuring that per-PTE RWP state is not silently destroyed or bypassed. The changes affect khugepaged, rmap, and GUP, with modifications made to their respective code paths to treat VM_UFFD_RWP the same as VM_UFFD_WP.
